title: oxalis squamata
intro: Oxalis squamata, also known as the water violet or yellow wood-sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxalis squamata include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Oxalis squamata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
